response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB at product companies, plus current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work that directly matches the role's AI agent development requirement. Strong testing culture (TDD, test framework authorship, testing workshops) and demonstrated cloud/container experience round out the profile. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest experience listed, though adjacent skills (Node.js frameworks, Java, Jest-style testing) suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience with production systems at scale
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling development, directly matching a required skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test libraries, led workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned despite it being in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python absent from listed skills; Java experience appears dated
Significant time on D-language and niche ecosystems may mean less recent depth in the exact primary stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
